label: MLC Asset
description: Primary custom object for Meridian Leasing Company. Required because the standard Salesforce Asset object does not support the specific roll-up relationships and calculations needed. Supports asset and shipping cost calculations at the campaign level based on product bundles. Created via the MLC Asset Mass Creation Screen Flow from Campaign record pages.
migrationNotes: MLC Asset records migrated from current Salesforce org. Custom object, custom fields, lookup relationships, and page layouts must be recreated in target org prior to data migration. Reporting requirements and calculation dependencies must be confirmed before migration. Reconcile migrated records against source org.

relationships.description: MLC Asset belongs to a Campaign via Campaign__c lookup
MLC Asset associated to CampaignMember via CampaignMember__c lookup
MLC Asset associated to Account via Account__c lookup
MLC Asset associated to Contact via Contact__c lookup
MLC Asset references a Product via Product__c lookup to Product2
MLC Asset associated to Product Bundle via ProductBundle__c lookup

fields.label: MLC Asset Name
fields.notes: Auto-populated or user-defined during Mass Creation Flow

fields.label: Campaign
fields.notes: Passed automatically from Campaign record page when flow is launched

fields.label: Contact
fields.notes: Set per selected contact during MLC Asset Mass Creation Flow

fields.label: Product
fields.notes: Selected per product section in Mass Creation Flow; up to 5 per flow run

fields.label: Equipment Type
fields.notes: Optional asset field; selectable in Mass Creation Flow product section

fields.label: Manufacturer
fields.notes: Optional asset field; selectable in Mass Creation Flow product section

fields.label: Model
fields.notes: Optional asset field; selectable in Mass Creation Flow product section

fields.label: Asset Cost
fields.notes: Supports asset cost calculation at campaign level

fields.label: Shipping Cost
fields.notes: Supports shipping cost calculation at campaign level

flow.name: MLC Asset Mass Creation Flow

screens.purpose: Campaign context confirmation - confirms or auto-populates campaign from record page
Contact selection - retrieve and multi-select campaign member contacts
MLC Asset and product selection - up to 5 asset/product combinations; checkbox to apply same product to all contacts
Review and confirmation - summary before record creation

flow.outcome: Creates one MLC Asset record per selected contact per completed product section

pageLayout.notes: Recreate custom object page layout. Confirm reporting requirements. Validate calculation dependencies.

fieldLevelSecurity.notes: Align FLS to the one standardized profile. Ensure access to custom object and all custom fields.

source: Meridian Leasing - Salesforce Sales Cloud Migration Design Document (Magna Technology Group, May 2026)
